HomePage.title12: Buy and sell popular digital currencies and track them all in one place.
HomePage.title14: The core team behind this platform comes from globally renowned internet and financial enterprises, including pioneers and veteran investors in the digital asset industry. They have extensive experience in research, technology development, and global operations in the digital asset sector. Our independently developed core trading system provides users with a fast and seamless trading experience. Our platform is committed to creating the safest, most stable, and most efficient digital asset trading environment for users worldwide.
HomePage.note1: Our independently developed high-speed trading matching engine can process up to 10,000 transactions per second.
HomePage.note2: Professional customer service supporting more than 20,000 customers worldwide.
HomePage.note3: An international operations team with extensive experience in blockchain and finance, expanding operations across 50 regions worldwide.

Our vision is to become the infrastructure platform of the blockchain world and contribute to charitable causes.

fee.title: About Processing Fees
fee.content: Processing fees are charges applied to certain transactions on the platform. The fee may vary depending on the type of transaction and the service method used.

futures.title: What Are the Rules of Futures Trading?
futures.content: Futures trading allows users to buy or sell assets at a predetermined price in the future. Users should pay attention to leverage, margin, and liquidation levels when trading.

limitMarket.title: What Are Limit and Market Orders?
limitMarket.content: A limit order allows you to set a specific price at which you want to buy or sell. A market order is executed immediately at the best available market price.

contract.title: What Are the Rules of Contract Trading?
contract.content: Contract trading may involve regulations regarding margin, leverage, trading fees, and liquidation. Users should carefully read the terms before trading.

InvitationPage.h3: Deposit now to receive commissions instantly.
InvitationPage.title18: Innovative products with a refined user experience. Our products deliver stable and reliable performance, supported by global customer service available 24/7.
InvitationPage.title20: A stable and efficient matching engine capable of processing up to 100,000 orders per second with a minimum latency of only 5 milliseconds.

loan.title: Loan Support
loan.warning: Once approved by the platform, you can apply for a loan from the platform!

rule1.title: 1. What is a Bybit Loan?
rule1.content: Bybit Loan is a financial service provided in cooperation with a third-party lending company, offering loans to meet short-term funding needs.

rule2.title: 2. How Can I Get a Loan? What Requirements Must Be Met?
rule2.content: The loan application process is designed to be as simple as possible. You only need a Bybit account. Please ensure that you have sufficient collateral in your Bybit account to apply for a loan, agree to the terms, and then contact customer service for confirmation.

rule3.title: 3. What Products Can Be Traded Using Borrowed Assets on Bybit?
rule3.content: Borrowed tokens can be used for any trading activity on Bybit, including leveraged trading, contract trading, and staking.

rule4.title: 4. Can I Withdraw Borrowed Assets?
rule4.content: Yes, you can withdraw borrowed assets. However, please note that your repayment will not be deducted directly from your Bybit account. You must complete the repayment before you can use the withdrawal function.

rule5.title: 5. In What Form Are Loans Provided?
rule5.content: Loans may be provided in popular cryptocurrencies such as USDT, BTC, ETH, etc., and will be credited to your total assets within 24 hours after the loan approval process is completed.

rule6.title: 6. What Is the Minimum Loan Term?
rule6.content: Currently, loan terms are available for 7 days, 14 days, 30 days, and 60 days. Users can repay borrowed tokens at any time. If you have any questions, please contact customer service for detailed assistance.

rule7.title: 7. Can I Repay the Loan Using a Different Currency?
rule7.content: Yes, you can repay the loan using an equivalent amount of BTC, ETH, or USDT.

rule8.title: 8. How Is the Loan Interest Calculated?
rule8.content:
Interest is calculated based on the actual loan duration (less than one month is counted as one month), with a monthly interest rate of 0.01. For example, if you borrow $100,000, the monthly interest payable is $1,000.

The last three days of each month are the repayment deadline. However, you may also complete the repayment earlier. If the last three days of the month fall on a Saturday, Sunday, or holiday, the repayment date will be postponed by 1-3 days.

rule9.title: 9. Can I Repay the Loan in Full or in Part Early?
rule9.content:
You can repay the loan early. You may contact customer service to request early repayment and complete the transaction.

If the early repayment amount exceeds $3,000 (or $3,500 or €3,500), the total amount payable, including fees, must not exceed the amount that would have been payable at the end of the original term. This means that in the case of early repayment, you must pay the same total amount.

rule10.title: 10. How Do I Pay the Principal and Interest?
rule10.content: Please contact customer service. They will provide you with a dedicated payment account.

rule11.title: 11. Is the Loan Automatically Repaid After Expiration?
rule11.content: Automatic repayment is currently not supported.

rule12.title: 12. What Happens If I Fail to Repay on Time?
rule12.content: To help you avoid missing the repayment date, our customer service team will notify you several times before the due date. If you miss the repayment date, your loan will be automatically extended for an additional 7 days. In this case, an additional overdue interest fee of 0.025 of the loan amount will be charged.
